name: Golurk

forms.name: Copper
forms.pokedexDescription: The mechanism within its body is said to produce never-ending lightning storms. It patrols the ancient chambers from which it was created. The only thing that stops it from its mission is its copper body aging with time. Once its oxidization reaches critical levels, it stops moving.

The only thing that stops it from its mission is its copper body aging with time. Once its oxidization reaches critical levels, it stops moving.

forms.name: Mega-Copper
forms.pokedexDescription: The massive copper chest it carries is filled with pure Infinity Energy. If opened even a crack, the energy that spills out is enough to power an entire city.

forms.name: Mega-Exposed-Copper
forms.pokedexDescription: The massive copper chest it carries is filled with pure Infinity Energy. If opened even a crack, the energy that spills out is enough to power an entire city.

forms.name: Mega
forms.pokedexDescription: The energy within Golurk has been stimulated by Mega Evolution. The Pokémon could explode at any moment.

pokedexDescription: It flies across the sky at Mach speeds. Removing the seal on its chest makes its internal energy go out of control.
